name: Always In Play Golf & Social
address: 90 Alexandria Pike Suite 15, Fort Thomas, KY 41075
about: Always In Play Golf & Social is a golf simulator venue in Ft. Thomas, Kentucky, offering five state-of-the-art golf simulators loaded with world-renowned courses. The venue combines a classic country club atmosphere with a local social establishment feel, providing a comfortable space to play, practice, or socialize. It features a full-service bar and allows outside food, making it suitable for individuals, friends, and families regardless of weather conditions.
why_golfers_like_it: Access to five state-of-the-art golf simulators with world-renowned courses
Full-service bar option for a complete social and golf experience
Family-friendly atmosphere that allows outside food
Convenient location directly off I-471 in Ft. Thomas, Kentucky

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: The website does not specify whether clubs are provided, so it's recommended to bring your own.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: Yes, outside food is allowed. The venue also has a full-service bar.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: Playing 18 holes can take between 1 hour to 4 hours, depending on the time slot selected.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, the venue is described as a place to enjoy time with family and friends, making it suitable for kids.
